query:
DELETE er1 FROM cpa_evaluation_results er1
INNER JOIN cpa_evaluation_results er2
WHERE er1.project_consultant_id = er2.project_consultant_id
AND er1.id < er2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute DELETE er1 FROM cpa_evaluation_results er1
INNER JOIN cpa_evaluation_results er2
WHERE er1.project_consultant_id = er2.project_consultant_id
AND er1.id < er2.id;
